brand_identity.name: MedMentor
brand_identity.tagline: O conhecimento do especialista, na palma da sua mão.

BrandLogo.description: A circuit-board medical cross icon. Use react-native-svg.
BrandLogo.instructions: Create a reusable component. If variant='full', use primary color for fill and white for strokes. If 'white', use white fill. If 'dark', use navy fill.

WhisperSpinner.description: Animated pulsing bar indicator for transcription state.
WhisperSpinner.implementation: Use Animated.loop with Animated.sequence to create a pulsing width or opacity effect on a View. The color should be primary (#0D7377) or secondary (#00B4D8).
WhisperSpinner.style: A horizontal bar that expands/contracts or a row of 3 dots that bounce.

changes: Update layout to center the logo
Remove manual colors and use theme colors
Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons
Ensure Searchbar uses theme.colors.surface and shadow
Update Mentor Cards: White background, shadow-sm, rounded-xl
Update User Message Bubble: background theme.colors.primary (#0D7377), text white
Update Mentor Message Bubble: background theme.colors.surface (#FFFFFF), text theme.colors.text (#14213D)
Replace ActivityIndicator in transcribing view with <WhisperSpinner />

theme_context.instructions: Update LIGHT_COLORS and DARK_COLORS with the new palette. Ensure all hex codes match the Brand Identity section.

layout.instructions: Add Font Loading for Inter (Inter_400Regular, Inter_700Bold). Return null or SplashScreen until fonts are loaded.

general_guidelines: Do not use hardcoded hex values in screens. Always use theme.colors.
Ensure all text uses the 'Inter' font family via the theme or style prop.
Primary buttons must be Teal (#0D7377) with White text.
Secondary actions can be outlined or text buttons in Teal.
Cards should have elevation (shadow) and rounded corners (12px or 16px).
Data-testids are mandatory for all interactive elements.
